name: Dual Keres
description: Tear through any target with these vicious, claw-like blades. The signature swords of Khora.

components.name: Argon Crystal
components.description:
A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Tear through any target with these vicious, claw-like blades. The signature swords of Khora.

components.name: Oxium
components.description:
Oxium is a rare lighter than air alloy of Orokin origin, used in certain Corpus Robotics.

Location: Venus, Jupiter, Mars, Neptune, Pluto, Eris, Europa, and Lua.

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

components.name: Tellurium
components.description:
This rare metal is foreign to the Origin System and can only be found in asteroids that have made the long journey from other stars.

Location: Archwing Missions on Uranus

patchlogs.name: Khora Prime: Update 31.7
patchlogs.changes: Ensnare your enemies and dominate the battlefield with your loyal Kavat, Venari Prime. Get Khora Prime, exclusive Prime Accessories, Weapons, Boosters and more instantly with Prime Access or earn Relics in-game to craft Khora Prime, Hystrix Prime and Dual Keres Prime.

patchlogs.name: Nora’s Mix Vol.2: Hotfix 31.6.4
patchlogs.changes: The Dual Keres now has a 20% Heavy Attack Efficiency when wielded by Khora.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.19.0
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the damage of the Dual Keres in Conclave.
